misc.title: #ONEPIECE1186 Usually, when Luffy returns to save his alliance partner and takes over the fight completely, the partner is sidelined (Law vs. Doflamingo, Yamato vs. Kaido). But this time is different;
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1186 Usually, when Luffy returns to save his alliance partner and takes over the fight completely, the partner is sidelined (Law vs. Doflamingo, Yamato vs. Kaido). But this time is different; Luffy is joining forces with a Loki who can still fight and hasn't even used his trump card yet. Hybrid Loki is going to be insanely hyped, guys.

misc.title: After all the Messi vs. Ronaldo debates, I think we should simply enjoy this rivalry and their final international matches. We will never again see a rivalry like this, two giants of this magnitude in
misc.text: After all the Messi vs. Ronaldo debates, I think we should simply enjoy this rivalry and their final international matches. We will never again see a rivalry like this, two giants of this magnitude in the same era... with insane teams.. It wss a great run...

misc.text: [OFFICIAL PLAYMAT LIMITED EDITION vol.6] The sixth official playmat featuring an original illustration is here! This special playmat also comes with a specially designed card, making it a must-have for collectors and players alike! Pre-orders will begin on Jun. 24 2026 10:00 PM (EDT) via Premium Bandai. Check the link below and find your region! en.onepiece-cardgame.com/pro… #ONEPIECE #onepiececardgame
